## Purpose

Contract/issue:

Non-goals:

## Change

- [ ] Public contract/schema impact is documented.
- [ ] No application semantics or imports entered Platform.
- [ ] Missing, degraded, stale, and version semantics are explicit where relevant.
- [ ] Migration and rollback are documented where relevant.

## Evidence

- [ ] `./scripts/quality_gate.sh` passes.
- [ ] Changed behavior has unit/contract tests.
- [ ] Consumer compatibility is tested where relevant.
- [ ] Open Code Review ran against final commit SHA.
- [ ] P0/P1 findings are resolved.
